rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Cornelia Wong, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 14, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFFS SERGEY GRECHKO, MAYYA GRECHKO, LUDMILA GRECHKO, OLGA GRECHKO, NICHOLAS GRECHKO, NICHOLAS GRECHKO, ALEX GRECHKO'S Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Cornelia Wong, And Request For Sanctions. GRANTED. Most of defendant's responses do not comply with C.C.P. §2031.210-2031.250. Within 30 days, defendant shall serve Code-complaint responses and any additional responsive documents, along with a privilege log for any information withheld on privilege grounds. Defendant shall also provide a verification that conforms with C.C.P. §2015.5 signed by Ms. Wong. Sanctions are granted. Ms. Wong shall deliver a check payable to Sergey Grechko in the amount of $1,320 to Volkov Law Office within 30 days. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories General, Set One, To Cornelia Wong, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 14, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFFS SERGEY GRECHKO, MAYYA GRECHKO, LUDMILA GRECHKO, OLGA GRECHKO, NICHOLAS GRECHKO, NICHOLAS GRECHKO, ALEX GRECHKO'S Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories General, Set One, To Cornelia Wong, And Request For Sanctions. GRANTED. C.C.P. 2030.250(a) requires verification by the responding party. Defendant shall provide a verification that conforms with C.C.P. §2015.5 signed by Cornelia Wong within 10 days. The request for sanctions is denied. =(501/REQ)
